content: This is the third time I've seen an old game getting revived in some way this week
First two were Starcraft 2 getting a major patch or smth, and Witcher 3 getting a new DLC
today i knew what envy was
last few patches drained every pull i had...
R.I.P I've been saving them for a while lol,should be at 280 by then hopefully
i doubt im pulling in the collab
unless its like a turbo busted unit
which knowing rev it probably is
The last collab was, so yeah
was going to skip him but i got kass on the free 10 pull lmao
I spent 90 on the last collab,idk why I spent that much when I couldn't pity it
i belive i got him on like 30?
honestly the last few patches i been having insane luck all things considered
p1 cheng, paper heron, tooth fairy and lorentz
Nautika's euphoria is gonna make her like her release, people are doing 1m per spear with her
They got the mane's bosses to 0 hp in like 5 rounds
i find it hilarious that sentinel, her dedicated support, isnt even BiS
Yeah I never got her, I use mercuia instead
5 rounds is what you need to stack bloodtithe
i got her simply because i fw her character heavy
but naut is one of my most invested units
maybe i try to get p1-2 in the rerun
rihanon is her current BiS no?
i dont think im getting her but its good to know for the future
Yeah same, I've got her to like p1 and maxed out. Maybe I'll use the second 180 to get rinnamon
i will be lucky if i even reach 15m
that reminds me i havent done my dailies today
been kinda burned out of the game tho ngl
kind of the whole reason im here rn tbh i installed morimens to try something new lmao
Yeah, there's not much to really do in r1999
once you clear endgame you are kinda set
the 3rd raid opens in like 2-3 days iirc
I never really do it, it takes too long, after Nautika's euphoria maybe
i do it because i like rewards and thats it
while i DO enjoy the combat
the later reveries gimmicks are so annoying
Yeah but like, you do raids to get stronger for the raids
(if you havent seen those tumblr posts i will just sound like an idiot)
I mean I haven't but I still get what you're saying I think
they boil down to "have this specific character to bypass the gimmick or spend 5 times more turns playing arround it while still being expected to do prime dps"
doing 500-4 i felt so smart using AAL to disarm liang on the counter turns
until i noticed i still needed to deal the damage
last phase was like 70% hp when i ran out of turns
i been playing for a while
Ah, I started at Kiperina's release, got her in like 10 pulls
I think it was after lucy's
If you wanna see something funny use Kiperina and marsha on the same team
i got both sotheby and lucy in my first 10 pull
lucy is one of the worst starting characters to get
she starts actually working at i3
before that she is incredibly awkward to play
and sotheby at the time was a trash healer
I didn't know that, dynamo sure is more confusing than Bloodtithe though
if you want to play dynamo just get charon first and then work arround that
he makes everything SO mcuh more nice to play
Well I have charon and uh the conductor, whatever her name is

you didnt nab the free ulrich?
i dont remember when he released
oh then you have the full team
pull for enigma if you have some leftover pulls then

those are for sure the priority
you can slot in kiperina and call it a day
add me while you are at it give me a sec to get my id
you never knw when they will add those events that allow you to use support units

wait i might have clicked someone else
because i saw someone with rubuska's skin

admitedly one of the worst ones but hey it was free
